caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt, a gold chain, and a navy blue baseball cap with a gold logo sits in a podcast studio. He wears headphones over his cap and speaks into a professional microphone positioned in front of him. The background is white with various logos, including a repeating "HUSTLE" motif with stars and the text "BOSS TALK 101". On-screen graphics include a "PODCAST" logo on the left and the "BOSS TALK 101" logo on the right. Across the sequence, the man's expression shifts as he speaks, moving from a closed-eyed, laughing expression to an open-mouthed smile while looking slightly off-camera to the left. He remains seated in the same position throughout the clip, with no changes to the setting or equipment.
